goal: Enforce non-skippable build playbook execution and verify the exchange distribution fix is fully resolved across all update paths

learnings.phase_name: Enforce non-skippable playbook execution in build orchestrators

learnings.claim: Adding pre-synthesis verification gates to build orchestrators catches incomplete builds before synthesis — gate should name all prerequisite stages explicitly
learnings.evidence: All 6 success criteria passed on first build attempt, watcher quality 9/10

learnings.claim: Running lint:sync and lint as a dedicated verification phase after code changes confirms no sync drift — useful as a final gate before colony seal
learnings.evidence: lint:sync confirmed 45+45 commands and 24 agents in sync, lint (shellcheck+json+sync) all clean, 524 tests pass
